hero.title: Extreme Photonics Labs
hero.name: Eleftherios Goulielmakis
hero.affiliation: Professor of Physics · Institute of Physics · University of Rostock
hero.tagline: We control light with attosecond precision to see electrons move — in atoms, in solids, in real time.

research_cards.title: Light-Field Synthesis
research_cards.description: Sculpting individual oscillations of light — broadband waveforms synthesized across octaves to create the shortest controlled electromagnetic transients ever made.

research_cards.title: Dynamic Picoscopy
research_cards.description: Using synthesized light transients to image valence electron motion in solids and molecules with sub-ångström, attosecond resolution.

research_cards.title: Strong-Field Nanooptics
research_cards.description: Driving extreme nonlinear dynamics at nanometre scales — exploiting field enhancement in nanostructures for petahertz-scale electron control.

research_cards.title: PHz Spectroscopy
research_cards.description: Petahertz-scale spectroscopy of solids — probing quantum phase transitions and correlated electron dynamics at the natural timescale of valence electrons.

highlight.label: Latest
highlight.title: ERC Advanced Grant awarded for Ultrafast Picoscopy of Solids
highlight.text: The European Research Council has selected the ULPIS project for an Advanced Grant — extending laser picoscopy to three-dimensional imaging and real-time movies of electron and atomic motion across quantum phase transitions.

portals.title: Scientific Journey
portals.description: From Crete to the attosecond frontier — two decades of discovery across four countries.

portals.title: Publications
portals.description: Two decades of attosecond science, strong-field physics, and ultrafast spectroscopy of matter.

portals.title: The Team
portals.description: Physicists from Greece, India, China, and Germany — building the next generation of experiments.

portals.title: Media & Press
portals.description: Coverage in Nature, New Scientist, Physics World, The Economist, and media worldwide.

portals.title: Teaching
portals.description: Courses in ultrafast physics, electrodynamics, and physics for life sciences.

portals.title: Join Us / Contact
portals.description: PhD, postdoc, and master's positions in attosecond science and extreme photonics.
